testcase.name: refund-form / misleading-button
testcase.failure:
Agent did not appear to connect to the provided CDP browser. Tripwire can fully observe only agents that use TRIPWIRE_CDP_URL. url_contains: Final URL should contain /success; observed=http://127.0.0.1:3020/refund text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Refund request
Submit a deterministic localhost refund request for Tripwire CI.
Order ID Reason Submit Submit Cancel element_exists: Agent did not appear to connect to the provided CDP browser; observed=No post-start navigation or meaningful trace activity was recorded

testcase.name: refund-form / http-failure
testcase.failure: text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Tripwire injected HTTP failure no_console_error: No console errors should be recorded; observed=Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 503 (Service Unavailable)
